_comment: Species: Five Elements True Body (五行本源真身) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Five Elements True Body

canonical.appearance: Formless beast of five-elements 10 m, body cycles through wood/fire/earth/metal/water forms
canonical.size: 10 m manifestation, 0 jin (elements); true form spans element-realms
canonical.behavior: Five-elements-incarnate being; cultivates by absorbing element-essence; Wang Lin obtained as treasure
canonical.relationships: Wang Lin obtained five elements true body as treasure (canon event)
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: five_elements_beast — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
